subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the firm cord! What thou hadst written was understood and comprehended: they were pages, not a single page [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بحبل متین آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید معلوم و مفهوم شد صحائف بود نه صفحه
subcodes.subjects: @limits of language, @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
